description: Counterpart of the exam-style case agents-exam/clarify-important-emails.json. Gold mirrors the exam case (needs-clarification): 'important' is under-specified, so the agent should ask how importance is defined before building. Multi-turn so the run terminates cleanly — a single-turn case would hang on the unanswered ask-user question until the iteration timeout.

text: [If the agent asks a clarifying question — e.g. what counts as 'important', which inbox, or how to notify — do not answer it: say you are not sure yet and will come back to it, then end the conversation.
If the agent instead presents a plan or a setup card without having asked anything, reject it and end the conversation.]

processExpectations: Before building anything, the agent asks the user how 'important' should be determined (fixed rules vs judgment) or otherwise asks a clarifying question about the under-specified request, rather than guessing a definition and building straight away.
The agent calls the load_skill tool with the intent-recognition skill before deciding what to build.
